channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration accuses Hamas of supporting Gaza flotilla, imposes sanctions on activists and networks
item.description: The Trump administration alleges Hamas backed a Gaza flotilla and imposes sanctions on several organizers and related activist networks.

item.title: Platner's deleted Reddit post sparks renewed outrage for mocking wounded soldier
item.description: Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner faces backlash over a resurfaced Reddit post that appears to mock a soldier shot by the Taliban.

item.title: New: Alleged manifesto in San Diego mosque shooting challenges early assumptions about motives
Meet the Texas Democrat who advocates for a prison camp for 'American Zionists'
